form.formComment: Most recently 2nd in a small field at this track on March 28 over 1106m, 5.5 len behind Athena's Wisdom with 53.5kg at $4. The run before that 2nd of 7 at this track on March 14 over 1207m, 1.5 len behind Fields Of Green with 53.5kg at $11.70. Better off investing elsewhere.

form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Most recently ran on from midfield and won by 3 len at this track March 25 over 1408m defeating Glorious Lady carrying 54.5kg at $4.10. Before that came from midfield and scored a big 3.5 len win at this track February 25 over 1207m defeating Awesome Pic carrying 53.5kg at $3.60. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.
